# Elk Search

## Overview

gSage AI — ``elk_search`` MCP tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `elk_search` | Search and explore external Elasticsearch (ELK) clusters: list indices, inspect mappings, run filtered queries with CSV/XLSX offload | `elk:search` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "url": "<value>"
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "allowed_index_patterns": [],
  "api_key": "<value>",
  "ca_cert": "<value>",
  "cache_ttl_seconds": 60,
  "default_export_format": "csv",
  "default_time_window_minutes": 60,
  "max_result_size": 500,
  "timeout": 30,
  "url": "<value>",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `allowed_index_patterns` | `array` | — | — | `[]` | Glob patterns that the LLM is allowed to query (e.g. ['logstash-*', 'filebeat-*']). An empty list denies everything. The hard-coded deny-list always applies on top. |
| `api_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | Base64 API key (id:secret) issued by Kibana → Stack Management → API keys. Optional: leave empty for unauthenticated clusters (e.g. lab / internal networks). Username/password auth is not supported in V1. |
| `ca_cert` | `string` | — | — | — | Optional path (inside the mcp-server container) to a PEM CA bundle used to validate the cluster certificate. |
| `cache_ttl_seconds` | `integer` | — | — | `60` | TTL for Redis caching of list_indices / describe_index responses (default: 60; 0 disables caching). |
| `default_export_format` | `string` | — | — | `"csv"` | Format used when offloading large search results to MinIO (default: csv). Caller can still override per call. |
| `default_time_window_minutes` | `integer` | — | — | `60` | Applied to search queries when no time_range is provided (default: 60 minutes). |
| `max_result_size` | `integer` | — | — | `500` | Upper bound for 'size' on a single search call (default: 500, hard ceiling 1000). |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `30` | Request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `url` | `string` | ✓ | — | — | External Elasticsearch cluster URL (e.g. https://elk.example.com:9200). MUST NOT point to the gSage internal cluster. |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Verify the server TLS certificate (default: true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__ALLOWED_INDEX_PATTERNS` | `allowed_index_patterns` | `array` | `[]` | — | Glob patterns that the LLM is allowed to query (e.g. ['logstash-*', 'filebeat-*']). An empty list denies everything. The hard-coded deny-list always applies on top. |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | Base64 API key (id:secret) issued by Kibana → Stack Management → API keys. Optional: leave empty for unauthenticated clusters (e.g. lab / internal networks). Username/password auth is not supported in V1. |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__CA_CERT` | `ca_cert` | `string` | — | — | Optional path (inside the mcp-server container) to a PEM CA bundle used to validate the cluster certificate. |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__CACHE_TTL_SECONDS` | `cache_ttl_seconds` | `integer` | `60` | — | TTL for Redis caching of list_indices / describe_index responses (default: 60; 0 disables caching). |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__DEFAULT_EXPORT_FORMAT` | `default_export_format` | `string` | `"csv"` | — | Format used when offloading large search results to MinIO (default: csv). Caller can still override per call. |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__DEFAULT_TIME_WINDOW_MINUTES` | `default_time_window_minutes` | `integer` | `60` | — | Applied to search queries when no time_range is provided (default: 60 minutes). |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__MAX_RESULT_SIZE` | `max_result_size` | `integer` | `500` | — | Upper bound for 'size' on a single search call (default: 500, hard ceiling 1000). |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | — | Request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__URL` | `url` | `string` | — | — | External Elasticsearch cluster URL (e.g. https://elk.example.com:9200). MUST NOT point to the gSage internal cluster. |
| `TOOL_ELK_SEARCH__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Verify the server TLS certificate (default: true). |
